text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while training for the upcoming Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And that's it for bench presses. Trainer, can I take
a break?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, just ten minutes.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: One... two... Come ooon, I've got three more sets!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hey, is that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Nice Nature's gaze to find Tokai Teio
training tirelessly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be using a machine specifically
designed to help her overcome particular physical
deficiencies.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, Nature! ♪ Let's take a break together!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Mayano! Perfect timing. What is Teio doing over
there?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
She's doing physical therapy! It was kind of a
serious injury, after all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I mean, Teio was in bed the whole time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I didn't know...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Ouch, my legs are cramping up! Did I push them
a bit too far?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You seem motivated, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, Prez! Of course! I'm doing perfect!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...I'd like to say that, at least, but I think I'm still a
ways off.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I'll be fully recovered soon! I feel like I'll come
back even faster than before! ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I expected the first words out of your mouth to be
a request for me to praise your efforts.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What?! I'd never do that! The time for praise is
when I win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Working hard is only natural! I can't afford to slip
up now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If I don't recover soon, I won't be able to run. If I
can't run... I won't catch up to you, right?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I see. My apologies. I suppose I underestimated
your mental strength.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are at a point in your career when your
abilities have stabilized, and you are both
physically and mentally well-rounded. I know it
would be tough on me if I was injured now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...So you came to cheer me up? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Who do you think I am, Prez?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Successful in races and concerts! Faster, stronger,
cooler than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm Teio—no! I'm the Invincible Teio! I can clear
any obstacle with ease!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Heh... That's right. I have high hopes for you,
Tokai Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Doesn't she seem even more energetic than
before?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hitting an obstacle made her stronger, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Small-fry characters like me get all confused
every time they hit an obstacle.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But she stands back up so easily. Main characters
are something else.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder if it was really that easy. She was
crying a lot.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It didn't surprise me. She missed such an
important race, after all. She looked like she was
having such a tough time.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... didn't know. Teio...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature seems to have something on her mind
during training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, she starts to work her feelings into
words bit by bit.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I was convinced... Or maybe... I wanted to
convince myself...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to think Teio is fast because she is the
main character. That she was born talented, and
the world works in her favor.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In order to protect myself, I told myself that it's
only natural that she's different from a side
character like me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... that's just not true. Teio is the same as I am.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
She loses races despite her best efforts and gets
injured. She knows about making it through tough
times.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What makes us different is... how we react to
those struggles. Her strength is the ability to
stand back up on her own.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...She really scares me now. I was thinking maybe I
could win against her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But unlike her, I'm a quitter—a coward and
complainer constantly grumbling about how life
isn't fair.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even though it was me who got off the stage,
saying I can't do it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I clearly don't know my place, and I know I sound
like a greedy, spoiled brat for saying this, but...
choice_data_list: But you still want to win.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means she and I have that one thing
in common. So maybe...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Maybe I can...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't finish the sentence, but the
determination shining in her eyes says it all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Teio will definitely race in this year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win. I'm going to let the world—and
Teio—know that I'm here too!
